overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dirt path through grassy fields at night in a video game environment. The player illuminates the path with a flashlight while approaching a cluster of trees in the distance, passing a dead tree along the way.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path through an open grassy field at night. The flashlight illuminates the trail ahead while a dead tree becomes visible on the right side. The distant tree cluster remains ahead against the dark sky.

segments.scene_description: Continuing forward along the dirt path after passing the dead tree. The distant tree cluster gradually approaches as the camera moves through the open grassy field, with only the flashlight cutting through the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a dark rural trail that leads from an open field toward a distant cluster of trees. It begins with the camera advancing down a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the night to reveal a solitary dead tree standing to the right. As the camera passes this skeletal landmark, the surrounding grassy field remains shrouded in darkness beyond the reach of the beam. The scene then shifts as the forward momentum brings the distant silhouette of the tree cluster closer and more defined against the black sky. Finally, the path continues to unfold under the flashlight's glow, steadily closing the gap between the open meadow and the looming woods ahead.
